reach_why: Combines known issues in unlearning, continual learning, and evaluation; opaque semantics adds edge cases, not wholly new territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links semantic opacity, weak surprise metrics, niche-skill erosion, and unlearning collateral damage into one failure picture.
falsifiable_why: Test by measuring retention, harmful-content removal, niche-skill drift, and evaluator disagreement under opaque-content interventions over time.
explanation: Ambiguous, rare, opaque content is where continual learning, unlearning, and weak monitoring most reliably fail.
